'''''Pyesmev''''' was a [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]]–designed [[Imperial Customs Corvette]].

==History==
One of several ships owned by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Venslas Beeli]], ''Pyesmev'' was not actually manufactured by a licensed Rendili [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] or contractor. It was instead built at an outlaw [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] from plans used without the permission of Rendili StarDrive.

Beeli purchased ''Pyesmev'' around the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] to replace a ship lost in a fight with the [[Sector Ranger/Legends|Sector Rangers]]. Due to the low quality of the facility in which it was constructed, it had a slightly less resilient hull than a Rendili-made light corvette.

''Pyesmev'' participated in Beeli's attempt to capture the privateer frigate ''[[Far Orbit]]''.

==Appearances==
